# React Native Mobile App - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
This is a React Native mobile application for messaging/chat with rating features, targeting both iOS and Android platforms.

## Tech Stack
- React Native with TypeScript
- Navigation system for multiple screens
- Chat and messaging features
- Rating and review system
- Push notifications

## Screen Structure
- M1: Conversation List
- M2: Active Chat
- M3: Read-Only Chat
- M4: Conversation Details
- F1: Rating Modal
- F2: Rating Success
- F3: Push Notification
- F4: Received Ratings
- F5: Rating Detail
- F6: Error Toast

## Development Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for type safety
- Follow React Native best practices
- Keep components modular and reusable
- Use proper state management
- Follow the existing screen naming convention (M1-M4, F1-F6)
